gist.headline: 3D icons, 2D effort
gist.blurb: The community just dropped a 3D Icon Generator into the greenhouse. Perfect for when your UI needs a little extra depth without the Blender learning curve.
gist.summary: Added the 3D Icon Generator to the community app showcase, allowing users to easily create 3D icons in various styles.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use a dedicated tool for generating 3D icons directly from the community apps list.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a 3D Icon Generator. Visuals should include 3D-looking icons (cubes, spheres, stars) popping out of a 2D screen or canvas. Polly the bee interacting with these 3D shapes.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, sculpting a chunky 3D pixel art star that pops out of a retro computer monitor. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.
